subcodes.first_line: Bear thou witness within thine own self that verily He is God, there is no God but Him, Who hath created all things through His Word which He created from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان اشهد فی نفسک بانه هو الله لا اله الا هو قد خلق کلشیء بکلمه التی خلقها من
subcodes.subjects: @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Word of God the cause of creation
